quality_highlights: concurrency.md: exemplary reference doc - dual-level concurrency tables, code examples, and well-organized sections including fan-out and queue behavior
safe_outputs_allowed_labels_validation.go: outstanding error message with CTR-015 code, explains problem, impact, and gives concrete fix examples
smoke-agent-all-merged.md: professional, actionable status messages with clear guard policy context and no theatrical language

single_file_improvements.issue: Theatrical run messages ('Adjusting monocle...', 'Lens cracked!', 'Perfection awaits!') are inappropriate for enterprise code review context, even in deprecated workflows that remain active
Shared imports cross-reference note is buried as a plain sentence in the intro paragraph - converting to a :::tip callout improves discoverability for the common pattern of reusing OTLP config
